allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('projectId:', d.get\('projectId'\)\); print\('sessionId:', d.get\('sessionId'\)\); screens=d.get\('outputComponents',[]\); [print\('screen:', s.get\('screenId','?'\), s.get\('title','?'\)\) for s in screens if isinstance\(s,dict\)]")
